steps.title: Match the plural subject
steps.content: The subject "Epic poems" is plural, and the sentence defines what epic poems typically are. The blank must be a plural noun phrase that also works with the relative clause "that tell a story and focus on heroic deeds."

steps.title: Reject possession and singularity
steps.content: A and C are possessive forms, which do not work as the predicate noun here. D is singular and does not agree with the plural subject or the plural verb "tell." The answer is B.
